mapper.select: SELECT account_number, balance, account_name, interest_rate, open_date, status, account_type FROM account_tbl WHERE customer_id = #{customer_id}

select a.account_number, a.balance, a.nickname as account_name, a.interest_rate, a.created_at as open_date, a.account_status as account_status, b.account_type from deposit_account_tbl a, deposit_product_tbl b where a.customer_id = #{customer_id} and a.account_status = 'ACTIVE' and b.account_type = 'DEPOSIT' and a.product_id = b.product_id

select a.account_number, a.balance, a.nickname as account_name, a.interest_rate, a.created_at as open_date, a.account_status as status, b.account_type from savings_account_tbl a, savings_product_tbl b where a.customer_id = #{customer_id} and a.account_status = 'ACTIVE' and b.account_type = 'SAVINGS' and a.product_id = b.product_id
mapper.update: UPDATE account_tbl SET status = 'closed' WHERE account_number = #{account_number} AND account_type = '입출금'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ACCOUNT_TBL ( ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CUSTOMER_ID, ACCOUNT_TYPE, BALANCE, INTEREST_RATE, YIELD_RATE, CURRENCY_TYPE, ACCOUNT_NAME, OPEN_DATE, STATUS, ACCOUNT_PWD ) VALUES ( #{accountNumber}, #{customer_id}, #{account_type}, #{balance}, #{interest_rate}, #{yield_rate}, #{currency_type}, #{account_name}, #{open_date}, 'ACTIVE', #{account_pwd} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ACCOUNT_TBL SET STATUS = 'CLOSED', CLOSE_DATE = NOW(), UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE ACCOUNT_NUMBER = #{accountNumber}
